mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where you're always right, even when you're wrong!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-last week, I walked into my favorite caf, ready for my usual morning latte. I strolled up to the counter, and before I could even place my order, the barista had the audacity to ask me to wait in line like everyone else. Can you believe it? Me, waiting in line? Unacceptable. I calmly explained to her that as the CEO of Bank of Entitlement, I simply don't wait in lines-it's beneath me. She had the nerve to argue with me, but I stood my ground, demanding to speak to the manager. Of course, the manager arrived and promptly recognized me as a valued customer. He not only made my latte with utmost care but also offered me a free pastry as an apology for the inconvenience. And that, my friends, is how I turned a simple coffee run into a VIP experience. A true testament to the power of entitlement.
